lesson: When scraping pages with shadow DOM components, page.querySelector() fails silently. Use page.evaluate() with manual shadow root traversal to access nested elements.
reasoning: Direct querySelector returned null for 3 consecutive attempts on shadow DOM elements. Switching to page.evaluate() with shadowRoot access succeeded immediately.
cross_rollout_critique: Previous rollout used page.$() which also fails on shadow DOM. The evaluate() approach is strictly superior for this case.
